name: @nasseralbusaidi/mizan
description: Local Claude Code spend dashboard with dual-account leak detection and zero runtime dependencies.

scripts.smoke: node bin/mizan.js --doctor && node bin/mizan.js --try > /dev/null && node bin/mizan.js --pricing > /dev/null && node bin/mizan.js --summary --demo --window 7 > /dev/null && node bin/mizan.js --weekly --demo > /dev/null && node bin/mizan.js --report --demo --window 7 > /dev/null && node bin/mizan.js --json --demo --window 30 > /dev/null
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run smoke && npm run pack:check && npm run install:check

author: Nasser Al Busaidi
